creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #1)

Hi. A new version is released (almost) daily at the moment, so keeping up will be challenging at the least. I had planned to pick the release from each friday. Otherwise you (the committers) will have to deal with daily PR's, which is a bit much if you ask me.

I'm open to suggestions for a more frequent PR schedule.
